blockingIssues.description: Carried forward from rounds 1-2: `pyproject.toml` still specifies `pybaseball @ git+https://github.com/jldbc/pybaseball.git` instead of the feature's explicit `pybaseball>=2.3` requirement, and the current virtualenv still reports pybaseball 2.2.7. No dedicated fix feature has landed for this mismatch yet.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded the missing `worker-4991f8d1 isolate unrelated model WIP` stash note in `.factory/library/workspace-state.md` so future workers know that repo-local model WIP was intentionally isolated during the statcast cache-fix validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the skill's Windows initialization/validation guidance with the repo's documented workflow by pointing workers to the direct `.venv\Scripts\python.exe` / `*_windows` commands and documenting the fallback when `.factory/init.sh` fails in Bash.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-t6-cache-invalidation review again recorded a justified deviation because the shared skill still prescribes generic pytest/py_compile commands while the Windows-safe workflow already lives in `.factory/library/environment.md` and `.factory/services.yaml`.
